banner.title: Reserve your spot at Nisarga.
banner.subtitle: Planning a family meal, a group outing, or just want a guaranteed table? Let us know ahead of time.

experiences.title: Three ways to dine with us.
experiences.subtitle: Whether it's a quick meal or a long evening — we have the perfect spot.

items.name: Indoor Dining
items.summary: Comfortable indoor seating with table service and full menu access.

items.name: Outdoor Seating
items.summary: Dine under the trees in our natural, greenery-filled outdoor area.

items.name: Group Booking
items.summary: Arrange seating for large groups, tourists, or family gatherings.

form.title: Tell us about your visit.
form.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll confirm your table. For urgent bookings, call us directly.
form.promise: We respond to every request. For immediate assistance, call us at +91 94816 00080.

items.title: Request received
items.description: Your details reach our team — we check availability for your preferred date and time.

items.title: Confirmation call
items.description: We call or message you to confirm your table and discuss any special requirements.

items.title: You're all set
items.description: Arrive at Nisarga and your spot will be ready — indoor or outdoor, your choice.

items.title: Enjoy your meal
items.description: Relax in our natural setting and enjoy authentic flavors. Stay as long as you like.
